category_sources: source_facts.description says Rust implementation of the Starlark language; official GitHub README says the project provides a Rust implementation of Starlark.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Starlark in Rust; source_facts.name is starlark-rust.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the main documentation surface and includes usage, components, and compatibility notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a Rust Starlark implementation with components including binary, LSP, and linter.
